projectsLimit.description: Number of items to retrieve in projects list query

username.description: Username of the user that owns the Azure DevOps PAT. May be needed for some versions of Azure DevOps Server.

examples.description: The defaults a new datasource starts with: patToken authentication with a projects limit of 100. jsonData.url and secureJsonData.patToken (empty here) must both be filled in to get a working datasource.

azureDevOpsServer.summary: Personal Access Token with username (Azure DevOps Server)
azureDevOpsServer.description: On-prem Azure DevOps Server: setting jsonData.username makes the backend send an explicit HTTP Basic header CreateBasicAuthHeaderValue(username, patToken) with a normalized (lowercased, trailing-slash-trimmed) collection URL. Needed for some Azure DevOps Server versions.

patToken.description: Authenticate against Azure DevOps Services (dev.azure.com) with a personal access token in secureJsonData.patToken. The URL is the organization URL; the PAT is sent as HTTP Basic auth (empty username + PAT).
